name: @elizaos/capacitor-websiteblocker
description: Blocks websites through the Eliza runtime on desktop/web, uses native Android VPN DNS enforcement, and manages a native Safari content blocker on iPhone and iPad.

scripts.build: bun run clean && tsc && rollup -c rollup.config.mjs

author: elizaOS

platformDetails.browser: Delegates website blocking to the connected Eliza runtime HTTP API when available
platformDetails.ios: Native Safari content blocker managed by the Eliza app with shared block state and Settings-based enablement
platformDetails.android: Native split-tunnel VPN DNS blocker with system-wide hostname blocking
